name: swarm-scope-enforcement
description: Block file operations outside the current step's declared scope
command: node -e "const ctx = JSON.parse(process.env.COPILOT_HOOK_CONTEXT || '{}'); const scope = JSON.parse(process.env.SWARM_STEP_SCOPE || '[]'); if (scope.length === 0) { process.exit(0); } const filePath = (ctx.arguments || {}).path || (ctx.arguments || {}).filePath || ''; const allowed = scope.some(s => filePath.includes(s)); if (!allowed) { console.error(JSON.stringify({ decision: 'deny', reason: 'File ' + filePath + ' is outside this agent step scope: ' + scope.join(', ') })); process.exit(1); }"
_comment: Stub for Upgrade 3 (Hooks Injection). Enable when hook generator is implemented.
